name: Deeside Timberframe
message: Bespoke Timberframes - Efficient, Durable, and Sustainable As one of Scotland’s leading timber frame companies, Deeside Timberframe brings together tradition, technology, and personal touch. We create precision-engineered timber frame buildings that offer cost and time efficiency, reduced environmental impact,  whilst ensuring safety remains at the forefront of our operations. Our commitment to quality, sustainability and exceptional service make us a trusted partner in building your future.
